user.title: Set up Fronius System
user.description: Please provide the Fronius host, polling interval, and required customer password. The update interval applies to both Modbus and authenticated Web API polling. Minimum 5 seconds. Optionally restrict Modbus Control to this Home Assistant host IP.

data.restrict_modbus_to_this_ip: Restrict Modbus Control to this IP

reconfigure.title: Review Fronius System
reconfigure.description: Review and save the Fronius host, polling interval, and required customer password for this migrated entry. The update interval applies to both Modbus and authenticated Web API polling. Minimum 5 seconds. Optionally restrict Modbus Control to this Home Assistant host IP.

data.restrict_modbus_to_this_ip: Restrict Modbus Control to this IP

error.unsupported_hardware: Unsupported hardware found. See error log for details.
error.scan_interval_too_short: Scan interval is too short. Minimum 5 seconds.
error.invalid_api_credentials: Customer login failed. Check the customer password.
error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine this Home Assistant host IP for Modbus restriction.

init.title: Review Fronius System
init.description: The Fronius entry "{entry_title}" was created with an older version of this integration or is missing the required customer password. Review and save the current host, polling interval, and required customer password. The update interval applies to both Modbus and authenticated Web API polling. Minimum 5 seconds. Optionally restrict Modbus Control to this Home Assistant host IP.

data.restrict_modbus_to_this_ip: Restrict Modbus Control to this IP

error.invalid_api_credentials: Customer login failed. Check the customer password.
error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine this Home Assistant host IP for Modbus restriction.

abort.entry_not_found: The Fronius entry no longer exists.

init.description: Set the Fronius host, polling interval, and required customer password. The update interval applies to both Modbus and authenticated Web API polling. Minimum 5 seconds. Optionally restrict auto-enabled Modbus to this Home Assistant host IP.
